source: Source-trace inspection of localized .strings resources on 2026-05-18 plus a validated multisurface-harness dry-run plan. No screenshot captures are committed under this directory.
gate_result_reason: No preserved screenshot evidence for any of the 6 long-script / inflection-heavy locales. Source-trace surfaced 5 new major HIG risks (HIG-DE-002, HIG-NL-001, HIG-RU-001, HIG-TR-001, HIG-UK-001) for Train/Write tab-bar truncation. German also carries the prior HIG-DE-001 (in-progress, source-fix-confirmed) from app-localization-german-hig-ui-regate. Internal-reviewer signoff is recorded for the 5 non-German locales here; German is native-reviewed.

signoff_baseline.non_german: internal-reviewer-signoff (not native speaker) recorded 2026-05-18 in each locale's localization/review/<locale>/<locale>-review-return.json (provenance.internal_reviewer_signoff)

harness_plan.dry_run_status: planned (42 captures = 6 locales x 7 surfaces; idb + idb_companion ready)
harness_plan.actual_capture_status: not run in this slice. Capture is deferred to a separate follow-up screenshot-capture slice to keep proof artifacts and gate evaluation in distinct lanes.

de.notes: Native-reviewed by Karoline on 2026-05-18. Carries prior HIG-DE-001 (in-progress, source-fix-confirmed) from app-localization-german-hig-ui-regate. New HIG-DE-002 from this gate flags the Write tab label 'Schreiben' (9 chars vs en 5) for truncation risk. 'Haushalt' for Home is a German native-review choice (household domain), not a translation defect.

nl.notes: Dutch 'Schrijven' for Write tab (9 chars vs en 5) is at the same length as German 'Schreiben'; see HIG-NL-001.

ru.notes: Russian 'Тренировка' for Train tab (10 chars) — see HIG-RU-001. Translation-quality concern (NOT a HIG defect): 'Запись' for Write means recording/entry rather than the action 'write'; native reviewer should confirm.

sv.notes: Swedish tab labels are uniformly short (5 chars max). No source-trace HIG risk identified.

tr.notes: Turkish 'Antrenman' for Train tab (9 chars vs en 5) — see HIG-TR-001. Turkish is agglutinative so longer compound forms are common; other tab labels are short here.

uk.notes: Ukrainian 'Тренування' for Train tab (10 chars) — see HIG-UK-001. Build Info detail row label 'Інформація про збірку' (21 chars) is the longest across these 6 locales. Translation-quality concern (NOT a HIG defect): 'Запис' for Write means entry/record rather than the action 'write'.

ru.labels_actions: source-trace-only (translation-quality risk on 'Запись' for Write; not a HIG defect)

uk.labels_actions: source-trace-only (translation-quality risk on 'Запис' for Write; not a HIG defect)

missing_evidence_for_pass: Build Info screenshot per locale with complete gate fields (version, build, commit short/full, branch, source-clean flags)
Today screenshot per locale with no visible app-owned English strings
All five root tabs per locale (especially Train and Write where source-trace flagged truncation risk)
Primary empty states per locale (Today/Train/Write/Career/Home/Patterns/Settings empty-state copy)
Primary actions per locale (Save, Cancel, Continue, primary CTAs)
Dynamic Type pass (standard text size + Larger Accessibility Text) — long-script bucket especially needs the AccessibilityXL pass
Accessibility labels/hints/values for the reviewed surfaces
not_claimed: any of these 6 locales is hig-ui-reviewed
any non-German locale in this bucket is native-reviewed
translation quality for any non-German locale in this bucket
screenshot-reviewed, device-verified, or testflight-verified for any locale in this bucket
downstream_recommendations: Run automation/smoke/capture_localized_surfaces.py --capture --locales de nl ru sv tr uk --surfaces today root-tab-train root-tab-write root-tab-career root-tab-home build-info date-count-plural-today --label-overrides path/to/long_script_label_overrides.json. The overrides file must cover nl/ru/sv/tr/uk today labels (German 'Heute' is already in the harness default catalog).

After capture, append findings to this gate, update the all-locale HIG evidence matrix per_locale_state for these 6 locales, and update each locale's scoped_surface_status from not-reviewed to passed-scoped / fail / partial.

Translation-quality concerns surfaced in source trace (NOT HIG defects): ru/uk 'Запись'/'Запис' for Write (entry/recording vs the action), nl 'Bewaren' for Save vs 'Opslaan' as a more common alternative, de 'Haushalt' for Home (household — Karoline's native-review choice). These belong to a native-review pass, not this HIG gate.

If any of the 5 new tab-truncation findings are confirmed by screenshot evidence, queue a single UI-tweak slice for tab-bar layout (likely under Features/, not within a localization slice) that addresses HIG-DE-002, HIG-FR-001 (from remaining-LTR gate), HIG-NL-001, HIG-RU-001, HIG-TR-001, and HIG-UK-001 together.

changes: Downgraded HIG-DE-002, HIG-NL-001, HIG-RU-001, HIG-TR-001, HIG-UK-001 severity from major to minor based on Today-surface screenshot inspection.
iOS auto-shrinks the longer tab labels at iPhone 17 portrait default Dynamic Type; no literal truncation observed.
Findings remain open because reduced text size is a real degradation, and the risk at smaller widths / larger Dynamic Type / VoiceOver is not yet verified.
Closed HIG-DE-002, HIG-NL-001, HIG-RU-001, HIG-TR-001, HIG-UK-001 via LocalizationAccessibilityRegression AccessibilityXL coverage.
regate_history.regression_proof: owlory_xcode/OwloryUITests/OwloryUITests.swift LocalizationAccessibilityRegression (testFreshDayShellSettlesUnderLargerAccessibilityText<locale>): shell settles + 5 tabs hittable under UICTContentSizeCategoryAccessibilityXL

closed_findings.summary: German Write tab label 'Schreiben' (9 chars) is significantly longer than the English 'Write' (5 chars). Tab-bar truncation risk on smaller iPhone widths and at larger Dynamic Type settings.
observed_evidence: Comparison: en=5, de=9, nl=9, ru=6, sv=5, tr=3, uk=5 chars across this bucket.
closed_findings.proof_path_or_chat_observation: Source-trace inspection only. No German Write tab screenshot is preserved.
closed_findings.screenshot_inspection_note: Captured Today screenshot at the proof path shows iOS auto-shrinks the long tab label to fit at iPhone 17 portrait default Dynamic Type. Literal truncation does not occur here. Severity downgraded from major to minor. Remaining risk: smaller iPhone widths, larger Dynamic Type, and VoiceOver users seeing the smaller text.
closed_findings.closure_evidence: owlory_xcode/OwloryUITests/OwloryUITests.swift LocalizationAccessibilityRegression (testFreshDayShellSettlesUnderLargerAccessibilityText<locale>): shell settles + 5 tabs hittable under UICTContentSizeCategoryAccessibilityXL passing under iPhone 17 / iOS 26.5; combined with screenshot evidence showing iOS auto-shrink behaviour, this finding is closed via maintained coverage.
